channel.title: VirtualBox on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in VirtualBox on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Systems — VirtualBox
item.description: Oracle’s cross-platform desktop Type-2 hypervisor. Ships its own kernel module (vboxdrv) per host OS family rather than using KVM; read through the lens of the portability tax that this ‘be your own kernel module’ choice imposes.
